summary: markable-table typosquat runs remote-fetched code via preinstall dropper
details: The package's package.json declares a preinstall hook that runs `node index.d.js`. index.d.js base64-decodes an async IIFE that fetches text from https://everydaynodechecker-39143n.vercel.app/api/key?mem=root0 and passes the response to `eval`, with the identifier `eval` reconstructed from the char-code array [101,118,97,108] and invoked via `globalThis[tag]` to evade static matching. This fires automatically on `npm install`, executing attacker-controlled JavaScript from a non-publisher Vercel-hosted endpoint on the installer's machine. The package name `markable-table` typosquats the popular `markdown-table` package.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
